blocks.text: Six points, six games: the Etihad hosts the title decider

Arsenal arrive six points clear with six games remaining. A City win drags the gap to three and forces a genuine run-in; anything else and the Gunners are almost home. Biggest Premier League match of the season.
🏎️ Bahrain GP 17:00 — Antonelli leads Russell by 9pts as F1's new generation takes command
🎮 Mon 02:00 — IEM Rio 2026 opens: rain (Håvard Nygaard) chases CS2 Major glory in Brazil
🎾 Mon 09:00 — Ruud fires up clay season at Barcelona Open; Madrid Masters follows Tuesday
